global_description: Large, robust mammal with thick, gray skin and a massive body. It features one or two prominent horns on its snout, small eyes, and large, rounded ears. The legs are short and sturdy, supporting its heavy frame.
discriminative_attributes: One or two horns on snout

part_details.head: Large with one or two prominent horns on the snout, small eyes, and large rounded ears.
part_details.body: Massive and robust, covered in thick, gray skin.
part_details.legs: Short and sturdy, supporting the heavy body.
part_details.horns: Prominent, located on the snout, typically one or two.
part_details.ears: Large and rounded, positioned on the sides of the head.
